Privacy policy

If you consent, I use Google Analytics to gather information about user traffic. This information decribes the user’s browser, window resolution, country, and city. The data is collected using cookies, which are placed on the user’s computer for a 30-day period. The data collected using Google Analytics is anonymized (i.e., there is no personally identifiable information). No data is collected if you do not consent.

Tactile Jekyll theme for Github Pages. Template adapted from A. Branham.
This site uses third party cookies and scripts to improve functionality. Approve Deny More information
